name: Freedom Versus Safety
description: Freedom and safety are both high-value needs, so many choices feel internally split.
life_effect: The person may alternate between over-control and sudden longing for escape.

name: Recognition As Permission
description: Recognition is treated as permission to exist, choose, or rest.
life_effect: The person may wait for external confirmation before trusting inner preference.

name: Meaning Over Status
description: Meaning has started to compete with visible achievement as a primary value.
life_effect: A purely prestigious path may stop working even if it remains externally successful.

name: Relational Truth Need
description: The person values relationships where truth can be spoken without losing position.
life_effect: Relationships become a major site of fate correction, not just emotional comfort.

name: Autonomy After Duty
description: Duty was learned earlier than autonomy, so freedom often needs a moral justification.
life_effect: The person may need to redefine freedom as responsibility to the future self.
